title: astragalus leontinus
intro: Astragalus leontinus, also known as the Leontine milkvetch, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family that is native to China. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are believed to enhance the body's natural defenses and reduce stress. The health benefits of Astragalus leontinus include improved immune function, reduced fatigue, and enhanced endurance, making it a popular remedy for individuals with chronic illnesses or undergoing chemotherapy. Herbal preparations of Astragalus leontinus include capsules, teas, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties.
